title: tests/example_run_results.json — committed last-verified run statuses
description: Written by scripts/run_examples.py (live) and scripts/ingest_captures.py; read by ab/progress/report.py to render the per-endpoint Run column. Only verified endpoints appear; derived statuses are computed, not stored. Keys MUST be sorted for no-drift stability.

results.description: Map of endpoint dotted path -> verification result.

status.description: Only outcomes that result from an actual run/paste are persisted. awaiting_data / awaiting_paste / missing_example are derived at render time, never stored.

checked.description: ISO date the result was produced (date only — keeps no-drift stable; passed in, never Date.now() at render).

source.description: How verified: live auto-run, ingested paste, or binary classification.

detail.description: Short reason for failing (capped unified-diff summary) or null.
